title: mcpx config
description: Configuration for mcpx — Lightweight CLI / JS Runtime for the Model Context Protocol.

mcpServers.description: MCP server definitions keyed by server name.

transport.description: Server transport type. 'http' for remote MCP endpoints, 'stdio' for local child-process servers.

url.description: MCP endpoint URL. Required for http transport. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

command.description: Executable to run. Required for stdio transport. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

args.description: Arguments passed to the stdio command. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

env.description: Environment variables for stdio process. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

cwd.description: Working directory for stdio process. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

headers.description: Extra HTTP headers for http transport. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

allowedTools.description: Tool allowlist. Glob patterns (* and ?). Only matching tools are visible/callable.

disabledTools.description: Tool denylist applied after allowedTools. Glob patterns (* and ?). Wins conflicts.

description.description: Human-readable server description. Shown by 'mcpx search'.

auth.description: OAuth authentication config used by 'mcpx auth <server>'.

lifecycle.description: Server lifecycle management for stdio transport.

mode.description: 'keep-alive' keeps the process running between calls. 'ephemeral' starts a fresh process each call.

idleTimeoutMs.description: Idle timeout in milliseconds before shutting down a keep-alive process.
